textPlain: This post describes the problem.  Also see the follow-up that describes a solution:https://jsteuernagel.de/posts/using-freebsd-to-make-self-hos...
Sounds like your homelab became too similar to a Fortune 500 IT job.

Overcomplicating stuff is an tempting trap we engineers often fall into.This weekend I paired with LLMs to try to simplify my app.So far we are at -2k lines of code.So many things I planned for and never used.

I always read blogs of this type and immediately try and find what the author has actually built. Usually it’s either absolutely nothing or a simple blog generator. Nothing wrong with that, but if you want to build stuff you eventually need to stop config twiddling and do it. Hope it works out for her.
Kind of a poor follow up, it doesn’t really address replacing all the parts from the original post. I guess they just eliminated the deployment pipeline and just use BSD jails instead?
